page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.large is an arm64-based server instance powered by a custom 2.75 GHz Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 2 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 2 vCPUs. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, yielding a memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates average single-core performance, with a stress-ng single-core CPU score of 1819.49 and a Geekbench single-core score of 1399.0. However, multi-core performance is weak, as shown by a stress-ng multi-core score of 3596.97 and a Geekbench multi-core score of 2487.0. Memory bandwidth is also constrained, with large block uncached read speeds at 25.82 GB/sec and write speeds at 13.63 GB/sec. Cryptographic and vector-heavy workloads show poor performance due to the lack of AVX and AMX instruction sets, though basic AES encryption is supported.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the custom Arm-based YiTian710 architecture offers a high memory-to-vCPU ratio without the premium pricing typically associated with x86 memory-optimized instances. This makes the ecs.r8y.large suitable for memory-sensitive but compute-light workloads. Recommended use cases include lightweight database operations, caching layers, text processing, and basic web serving where memory capacity is prioritized over raw multi-threaded processing power.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.large is an arm64-based, memory-optimized server instance powered by a 2.75 GHz Alibaba YiTian710 processor. It features 2 dedicated physical cores (2 vCPUs) and 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The instance operates on the KVM hypervisor, lacks local storage, and offers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show average single-core capabilities but weak multi-core and memory write speeds, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 3596.97. Lacking advanced vector and matrix extensions, it is less suited for heavy mathematical computations. Qualitatively, the custom Arm architecture provides a cost-effective option for memory-intensive, low-compute workloads. It is best suited for lightweight databases, caching layers, and text processing tasks.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.large is an arm64 server featuring a 2.75 GHz YiTian710 processor, 2 vCPUs, and 16 GB of RAM. It offers a cost-effective memory-to-vCPU ratio for lightweight database and caching workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r8y.large is an arm64 server with 2 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and a 2.75 GHz YiTian710 CPU, optimized for memory-intensive, low-compute tasks.
tagline: An arm64-powered instance offering a high memory-to-core ratio for cost-efficient caching and lightweight database workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by a custom 2.75 GHz Alibaba YiTian710 arm64 processor
Features 2 dedicated physical cores and 16.0 GB of RAM
Delivers a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps
Exhibits average single-core performance but limited multi-core scaling
Best suited for memory-sensitive workloads like caching and lightweight databases
